nasb.text: Is there any pleasure to the Almighty if you are righteous, Or profit if you make your ways perfect?

esv.text: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty if you are in the right, or is it gain to him if you make your ways blameless?

cnv.text: 你為人公義可討全能者喜悅嗎？ 你行為完全可有利於他呢？

ccb.text: 全能者岂会因你为人公义而喜悦， 因你行为纯全而获利？
